creator: sysseh@devetir.qld.gov.au
text:
Trace a program, preferably one that forks off a few children, with
	ktrace -di. I used ktrace -di fvwm. It will, after some activity, cause
	the machine to reboot without a panic message.

Fix: 

Unknown (alas)



        I do not speak for the Worker's Compensation Board of Queensland -
                     They don't pay me enough for that!
How-To-Repeat: 
	ktrace -di your_favorite_forking_program
